hero.catch:
The One and Only Smoothie
That Lets You Taste the Fruit Itself.

concept.label: CONCEPT
concept.title: Experience Seasonal Fruits With All Five Senses
concept.body: Our smoothies contain no water and no ice — only carefully selected seasonal fruits. We don't just offer a drink. We invite you to taste the natural sweetness and aroma of fruit with all your senses.

philosophy.label: PHILOSOPHY
philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
philosophy.p1_body: Most smoothies use water or ice, but not ours. Only fruit — so the natural sweetness comes through exactly as nature intended.
philosophy.p2_body: Before we blend, we always offer a taste of the fresh fruit. Because the full experience includes eating, not just drinking.
philosophy.p3_body: From Akiyama Farm's Dekopon in Kagawa to Dejima no Hana's mikan in Sasebo — we source directly from farmers we trust.

owner.label: OWNER
owner.title: Meet the Owner
owner.bio1: Born and raised in Tsukiji. Growing up alongside his father's 150-year-old premium fish wholesale business, he developed a deep appreciation for seasonal ingredients — learning the difference between exceptional and ordinary through taste and touch.
owner.bio2: "The same fish can be extraordinary or forgettable depending on its origin, season, harvesting method, post-catch handling, and timing of service." This conviction extends equally to fruit. A producer's passion and care are embedded in the product itself — and that is what moves the person who tastes it.
owner.bio3: A new chapter, past the age of 60. His mission: to bring the world's finest fruit closer to everyday life, and to share the story behind each fruit exactly as it is. That is why Bella Frutta was born.

partner.label: PARTNER
partner.title: Our Partner
partner.name: Mr. Yamazaki
partner.shop: Yukimilk — Natural Shaved Ice, Kuki, Saitama
partner.bio1: While traveling Japan in search of the finest fruit and shaved ice, I discovered Yukimilk — a renowned natural shaved ice shop in Kuki, Saitama. It took many calls to land a reservation, but I kept coming back.
partner.bio2: Over time, owner Yamazaki-san and I bonded over a shared passion for fruit. When I shared my vision for Bella Frutta in summer 2024, he turned down offers from major corporations to join us as a sourcing partner — and a shareholder. He is the business partner I trust and respect most.

instagram.label: INSTAGRAM
instagram.title: Seasonal Fruit Updates on Instagram
instagram.body: We share the latest seasonal fruit arrivals and smoothie updates on Instagram. Follow us to stay in the loop.

menu_page.title: Menu
menu_page.description: Fresh smoothies and cut fruit made with seasonal ingredients.
menu_page.empty_filtered: No items found in this category.

calendar_page.title: Fruit Calendar
calendar_page.description: Discover what's in season at Bella Frutta.

corporate_page.title: Corporate Inquiries
corporate_page.description: We offer smoothie wholesale and fruit gift services for businesses.
corporate_page.service1_body: We supply the same quality products in pouches (100–350ml) for corporate clients. Ideal for dessert menus, energy-boost programs, beauty & anti-aging menus, post-spa relaxation, events, and catering.
corporate_page.service2_body: On-site catering for events and parties. We bring seasonal smoothies and cut fruit directly to your venue.
corporate_page.service3_body: We offer seasonal fruit gifts tailored to your gifting needs. Please get in touch to discuss your requirements.
corporate_page.cta_body: For inquiries, please use our contact form.
